name: chr1_pericentric_inversion_polymorphism
description: Pericentric inversion polymorphism inv(1)(p13q21)-class variants spanning the chr1 centromere and 1q12 HSat2/HSat3 heterochromatin block. Recurrent in the population; complicates SV mapping near the chr1 centromere.

architecture.internal_structure: Pericentric inversion spanning chr1 centromere and 1q12 classical heterochromatin block; breakpoints in alpha-satellite / pericentric HSat.
